title: read  excel only support '.xlsx' suffix? read xls undefined
author: dylan66ty

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @dylan66ty @xyunsh Support for reading xls suffixes, can you give an example of a problematic excel file and code?

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @dylan66ty @xyunsh exceljs does not support xls format excel for the time being, you can choose xlsx library
